message:
fix(e2e): Forbidden safety tier must reject even owner-zone provenance

The owner_zone_record_drives_all_tiers test asserted the wrong
invariant on the Forbidden tier: it expected
can_drive_operation(Forbidden) to return Ok(..), which would have
allowed an owner-zone record to drive a Forbidden operation — directly
contradicting the safety model.

Flip the assertion to .is_err() and add an explanatory comment:
Forbidden operations are NEVER allowed, regardless of provenance.

This is a genuine test-correctness fix. The surrounding assertions
for Safe/Risky/Dangerous/Critical remain .is_ok() (owner-zone DOES
drive those), so only the Forbidden case is corrected.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
